patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1 dominates today scored slate: fires on CLE@DET (-8.83pp), BAL@TB (-4.94pp), TOR@NYY (-9.15pp), and MIL@CHC (-1.70pp), demoting all from strong pre-cap grades to B-. Validated 5+ times in archive -- negative-edge market information is consistently superior regardless of F-signal strength.

CHW@SEA mirrors archive SEA@HOU OVERRIDE wins (05-11, 05-12, 05-14): f5_full_delta=0.2392 + SP edge 1.56 xERA for SEA + fair_prob=0.3885 below 0.42 floor + PQI delta=+31.5 strongly against CHW -- all four OVERRIDE conditions simultaneously met.

PQI strongly against pick (delta > 20pp) combined with SP edge against is a reliable DOWNGRADE signal even when F3 fires: NYM@WSH (PQI delta=-26.6) and HOU@MIN (PQI delta=+22.5) validate the CHC@ATL 05-14 archive lesson that F3 alone cannot overcome opposing market information.

BAL@TB pick-column integrity: CSV pick=TB (home, full_prob=0.5144 > 0.5). HARD CAP 1 correctly zeroes stake; TB is the model direction. Avoid CHC@CHW-style inversion error documented in 05-16 archive.

Coors Field late-game reversal suppresses f5_full_delta OVERRIDE logic for TEX@COL: archive (05-15 ARI@COL 9-1 away blowout) confirmed extreme f5_full_delta at COL home does not support OVERRIDE when SP edge also runs against the home pick.

CLE @ DET.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 correctly fired on -8.83pp negative edge, zeroing stake. Full_prob=0.5001 is a near-coin-flip. f5_full_delta=0.2188 is large -- CLE dominates F5 at 71.89% and DET thesis requires bullpen carry in second half. F1* carries thin-sample asterisk. fair_prob=0.5884 means market is substantially more bullish on DET than model. No qualitative context overrides the cap.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 negative-edge enforcement (5+ archive validations)
large f5_full_delta bullpen-carry concern
F1* thin-sample asterisk as additional caution

BAL @ TB.reasoning: CSV pick=TB (home, full_prob=0.5144). HARD CAP 1 fired on -4.94pp negative edge, zeroing stake. BAL lineup (Henderson, Alonso, ONeill) significantly outclasses TB home batters (Vilade #4 LOW_SAMPLE). Cap correctly applied; no stake.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 negative-edge enforcement
bullpen_fatigue + large f5_full_delta undermines bullpen-carry thesis

Cannot independently verify SP quality without live data. CONFIRM the non-bet.

NYM @ WSH.reasoning: Grade C (score=0) reflects deep headwinds: SP edge 1.82 xERA AGAINST WSH small-sample pitcher (min_pa=70), PQI strongly against WSH (delta=-26.6). NYM lineup (Soto 0.999 OPS vs RHP, Bichette, Vientos) outclasses WSH (Brady House SUB_STABLE, Daylen Lile SUB_STABLE). F3=2908.6 fires for WSH but per archive (CHC@ATL 05-14), F3 alone cannot overcome SP-edge plus strong PQI headwinds. DOWNGRADE from GOLD to SKIP.

PQI delta > 20pp against pick is reliable DOWNGRADE signal
small-sample SP risk (min_pa=70)

TOR @ NYY.reasoning: HARD CAP 1 fired on -9.15pp edge, zeroing stake. Pre-cap score=3 (B+): F2=0.037, F3=7165.3 (largest on slate), SP edge 1.88 agrees, PQI+11.9 -- strong pre-cap signals. NYY lineup (Judge, Goldschmidt) is elite. However market prices NYY at 63.53% vs model 54.38% -- market substantially more bullish. acute_roster and confidence_downgrade stack. Per archive, every negative-edge GOLD/PLATINUM staked pick has produced a loss. CONFIRM HARD CAP 1.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 absolute regardless of F-signal strength (KC@CHW 05-14: F1+F3 both strong, still lost)
stacked pipeline flags (acute_roster + confidence_downgrade)

BOS @ KC.reasoning: Tier=GOLD but edge 2.78pp misses the 4pp band floor, zeroing stake. Three stress flags stack: acute_roster, bullpen_fatigue, confidence_downgrade. PQI mildly against KC (delta=-4.6). F3=2368.3 fires for KC but BOS lineup (Duran, Contreras) is solid. Without edge clearance and three flags stacked, GOLD overstates pick quality. Explicitly DOWNGRADE to SKIP.
lessons_applied: edge below 4pp floor prevents staking
three-flag stack (acute_roster + bullpen_fatigue + confidence_downgrade) as DOWNGRADE trigger (DET@KC 05-09 validated)

CHW @ SEA.reasoning: All four archive-validated OVERRIDE conditions met: (1) f5_full_delta=0.2392 -- SEA wins F5 at 71.78% via SP edge (1.56 xERA for SEA); (2) confirmed quality opposing SP for SEA; (3) stacked flags: bullpen_fatigue=True + confidence_downgrade=True; (4) fair_prob=0.3885 below 0.42 floor. PQI strongly against CHW (delta=+31.5) -- largest on slate. CHW lineup has Antonacci and Murakami both LOW_SAMPLE. Mirrors SEA@HOU OVERRIDE wins (05-11 3-1, 05-12 10-2, 05-14 8-3) that went 3-for-3. Stake is 0 (D-grade SKIP) but SEA is the correct directional read.
lessons_applied: four-condition OVERRIDE rule: f5_full_delta > 0.20 + quality SP + stacked flags + fair_prob below floor (6+ archive validations)
SEA@HOU structural misread pattern applied to CHW@SEA
